title: Local Opportunities & Economic Impact
text:
Sandia Science & Technology Park (SS&TP)
Join Albuquerque’s premier technology community and gain access to world-class facilities, technologies, scientists, and engineers. Learn more about SSTP…
Livermore Valley Open Campus (LVOC)
Partner with researchers from Sandia CA / Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory, academia, and industry to work on today’s biggest science and engineering challenges in energy, computing, bioscience, and detection technologies. Learn more about LVOC…
Center for Collaboration & Commercialization (C3)
C3 serves as a “front door” to Sandia and is designed to strengthen partnerships, technology transfer, and ties in the Albuquerque community, and offers services to boost Sandia’s interaction with industry, academia, and government.
